title: Canthium longistylum

This family includes over 600 genera and 13,000 species of plants, many of which are important for their medicinal, ornamental, or economic value. The genus Canthium is a group of tropical shrubs or small trees, many of which are endemic to Africa and Asia. The specific classification of Canthium longistylum is as follows: genus Canthium, family Rubiaceae, order Gentianales, class Magnoliopsida, and kingdom Plantae.
